---
mode: ask
description: Bonus — Explain landing-zone enforcement to a non-technical exec in 30 seconds.
---

In 30 seconds or less, explain to a non-technical executive:

1. What the file
   `.github/instructions/terraform-landing-zone.instructions.md` does.
2. Why encoding policy as a Copilot instructions file lets a small
   infrastructure team govern many workload teams without becoming a
   bottleneck.
3. How Copilot Code Review + the coding agent turn that policy file into
   an always-on reviewer and an always-on remediator.

Use plain English. No YAML, no HCL, no rule IDs.
